untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dealer inventory percentile tracking, fundamental value estimation, bid-ask spread baseline comparison, and uninformed trader net buying pressure detection. These microstructure metrics are not available in the allowed indicator set. The rule relies on order flow and inventory data that would require external data sources or custom calculations not in the standard technical indicator toolkit.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy mapping: used returns (log_returns) for price discount to fundamental value approximation; used vol_ratio_20 as proxy for bid-ask spread widening. However, core dealer inventory percentile and uninformed buying pressure conditions cannot be expressed with available indicators. This signal is fundamentally untranslatable without access to order book microstructure data.
